name: Crestfall Company
specialty: Experts in demolitions and fortification breaches, known for their unparalleled precision and efficiency in navigating the Undercity's ever-shifting landscape

members.name: Axel Crestfall
members.note: Axel, the eldest of the Crestfall siblings, carries the weight of his family's legacy and the scars from countless battles

members.name: Evelyn Crestfall
members.note: Evelyn's uncanny ability to locate rifts and the eerie glow from her cat-like eyes are a common sight in the Undercity

members.name: Thorgrim Ironfist
members.note: Thorgrim, a veteran of the Iron Fang Consortium, is known for his imposing stature and the ominous sound of his battle-hammer

members.name: Bronwyn Stonebreaker
members.note: Bronwyn, with her peculiar combination of elven grace and half-dwarven strength, is renowned for her arcane prowess and enigmatic aura

visual: Clad in reinforced leather and steel, they move with a unified purpose, their faces hidden behind masks bearing the emblem of the Iron Fang Consortium. The Crestfall Company is a sight that strikes fear into the hearts of their foes and respect from their peers
reputation_note: Rumored to have a secret pact with the Iron Fang Consortium, the Crestfall Company's actions are whispered about in hushed tones, a warning to those who cross their path
